revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Script/doc/id-unk]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2518 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Script/doc/id-unk/core |input1={{{input1|<noinclude>Test</noinclude>}}} |alpha4={{Script/doc/id-unk/name-to-alpha4|input1={{{input1|<noinclude>Test</noinclude>}}}}} |is-alpha4={{#invoke:String|match|s=_{{Script/doc/id-unk/name-to-alpha4|input1={{{input1|<noinclude>Test</noinclude>}}}}}|pattern=^_[A-Z][a-z][a-z][a-z]$|plain=false |nomatch=}}<!-- is-alpha4=empty/blank when false --> |is-in-unicode={{ISO 15924 alias|alpha4={{Script/doc/id-unk/name-to-alpha4|input1={{{input1|<noinclude>Test</noinclude>}}}}}|default=}}<!--is-in-unicode=Unicode Alias ID when true; blank when false --> }}<!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
